name: MSI MPG GUNGNIR 110R (WHITE)
highlights: MPG GUNGNIR 110R WHITE is a premium mid-tower gaming case designed for versatility and performance
With support for ATX, Micro-ATX, and Mini-ITX motherboards, this sleek white chassis features a modern front panel with high-speed USB 3
2 Gen 2×2 Type-C, brilliant ARGB lighting with 4 pre-installed fans, and extensive radiator support up to 360mm
Built for high airflow and easy cable management, the MPG GUNGNIR 110R WHITE is perfect for building a clean, high-performance PC setup
description: MSI MPG GUNGNIR 110R (WHITE) Price in Pakistan Feature Specification Product Name MPG GUNGNIR 110R WHITE Case Form Factor Mid-Tower Motherboard Support ATX / Micro-ATX / Mini-ITX I/O Ports – 2 x USB 3.2 Gen 1 Type-A (5Gbps) – 1 x USB 3.2 Gen 2×2 Type-C (20Gbps) – 1 x LED Switch Button – 1 x Audio-out – 1 x Mic-in Drive Mounts – 2 x 2.5” – 2 x 2.5”/3.5” combo Expansion Slots 7 Maximum GPU Length 340 mm / 13.39 inches Maximum CPU Cooler Height 170 mm
